Title: CoverageList_Alphabetical_Order
Description: Verify coverage rows are sorted alphabetically by Coverage Name in the Sub Limits table
Steps:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Scroll to the Sub Limits section.
5. Inspect the Coverage Name entries from top to bottom.
6. Refresh the Coverage tab or reload the page.
7. Confirm the alphabetical order is preserved.
Expected Results: Coverage rows are displayed in alphabetical order by Coverage Name and the order remains consistent after refresh.

Title: CoverageList_Alphabetical_Order_BlankName
Description: Verify blank or missing Coverage Name entries are placed after valid names
Steps:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Add or locate a coverage row with a blank or missing Coverage Name.
5. Refresh the coverage list.
6. Inspect the list ordering.
7. Confirm valid coverage names appear before blank entries.
Expected Results: Blank or missing Coverage Name entries appear after all valid coverage names
Priority: and valid entries remain in alphabetical order.

Title: CoverageList_SpecialCharactersSorting
Priority:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Add or identify coverage rows with punctuation, numeric characters, and long names.
5. Refresh or reload the coverage list.
6. Confirm the entries are sorted in stable alphabetical order.
column9: and long text are sorted correctly without breaking the table layout.

Title: ScrollBar_Appears_InContainer
Description: Verify the coverage list container displays a vertical scroll bar when content is taller than the view area
Steps:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Scroll to the Sub Limits section.
5. Confirm the coverage list has more rows than fit in the visible container.
6. Observe the coverage list for a vertical scroll bar.
7. Scroll within the coverage container.
Expected Results: A vertical scroll bar appears inside the coverage list container when content exceeds the visible area
Priority: and scrolling works only within the coverage list region.

Title: ScrollBar_Container_NotFullPage
Description: Verify vertical scrolling is limited to the coverage list region
Steps:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Scroll to the Sub Limits section.
5. Ensure the coverage list is long enough to require scrolling.
6. Scroll inside the coverage container.
7. Confirm the main page body does not move with the internal scroll.
Expected Results: Scrolling occurs within the coverage list container only; the main page content remains static during coverage list scrolling.

Title: Pagination_Controls_Present_TopAndBottom
Description: Verify pagination controls appear at both top and bottom of the coverage list
Steps:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Scroll to the Sub Limits section.
5. Check for pagination controls above the coverage list.
6. Check for pagination controls below the coverage list.
7. Confirm both display the current page and record count.
Expected Results: Pagination controls are visible above and below the coverage list
Priority: and both show the same page number and total record count.

Title: Pagination_TopControl_Navigation
Description: Verify top pagination controls can navigate pages correctly
Steps:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Use the top controls to go to the next page.
5. Use the top controls to go to the previous page.
6. Use the top controls to go to the first page.
7. Use the top controls to go to the last page.
Expected Results: Top pagination controls navigate correctly between first
Source: and last pages and update the coverage list accordingly.

Title: Pagination_BottomControl_Navigation
Description: Verify bottom pagination controls can navigate pages correctly
Steps:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Use the bottom controls to go to the next page.
5. Use the bottom controls to go to the previous page.
6. Use the bottom controls to go to the first page.
7. Use the bottom controls to go to the last page.
Expected Results: Bottom pagination controls navigate correctly between first
Source: and last pages and update the coverage list accordingly.

Title: Pagination_TopBottom_Sync
Description: Verify top and bottom pagination controls remain synchronized after navigation
Steps:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Use the top pagination controls to move to a new page.
5. Verify the bottom pagination controls match the same page state.
6. Use the bottom controls to move to another page.
7. Verify the top controls match the same page state.
8. Confirm the coverage rows display the expected page contents.
Expected Results: Top and bottom pagination controls remain synchronized; changing page from one set updates the other set to the same state and content.

Title: InformationalRows_StablePosition
Description: Verify informational header rows are not sorted with coverage rows
Steps:
1. Login to EzDocs.
2. Open an Energy Property submission.
3. Go to the Coverage tab.
4. Scroll to the Sub Limits section.
5. Locate the informational row (e.g., 'LIMITS ARE APPLICABLE...').
6. Inspect the coverage row ordering below it.
7. Confirm the informational row remains above the coverage list and does not move.
Expected Results: Informational header rows remain in place and are not included in the alphabetical sorting of coverage rows.
